删除清理Alist：

# 一键清理 alist 残留文件和进程
pkill -f alist && \
sudo find / -name "*alist*" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null && \
rm -rf ~/Library/LaunchAgents/*alist* \
       ~/Library/Logs/*alist* \
       ~/.config/alist \
       /usr/local/bin/alist \
       /etc/alist \
       /var/log/alist \
       /usr/local/share/alist && \
sed -i '' '/alist/d' ~/.bashrc ~/.zshrc ~/.bash_profile ~/.profile 2>/dev/null && \
echo "alist 已清理完成。"
